examples: That is the unvarying standard of my feelings.
Whoever drinks the poison will die consequentially, which is the unvarying truth.
One other unvarying trait of omnipotents is that they seldom take their vacations all at once.
That was where the motley sediments of ancient Mars were succeeded by layer upon unvarying layer of brownish rock, two miles high.
The late Apple co-founder was best known for his visionary leadership and innovation but he was also known for his unvarying signature look.
